title: Building an AI app: A low-code guide for small teams
summary: Google Cloud offers a low-code approach for small teams to build AI applications without AI expertise by combining Gemini, Cloud SQL, and AlloyDB for PostgreSQL. The platform auto-generates code and enables advanced capabilities such as natural language interfaces, hybrid search, image search, and recommendations.
writeup: This video walks through Google Cloud's low-code path for small teams to build AI applications without prior AI expertise, combining Gemini, Cloud SQL, and AlloyDB for PostgreSQL. It matters because it lowers the bar for shipping AI features by auto-generating code rather than requiring teams to write it from scratch. The concrete takeaways: the platform can generate the application code and supports natural language interfaces, hybrid search, image search, and recommendations.
